name: Portuguese-American Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Chourico sausage (or more) (or use garlic sausage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the bread in water until soft. Squeeze out excess moisture and break it up.
2. Simmer the sausage, liver, and gizzard in water until tender. Drain and set aside.
3. In a large frying pan, sauté onion in oil until softened.
4. Add garlic and parsley to the pan.
5. Stir in spices (black pepper and paprika) and meat from step 2 into the pan.
6. Add beaten eggs to the mixture.
7. Return all ingredients to the frying pan and cook until slightly dry before stuffing the turkey.
8. Stuff a 12-pound turkey.
